svg.title: PipelinePulse architecture diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing data sources flowing into a backend aggregation layer, then to a real-time layer and frontend dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions API integration work in PipelinePulse?')
sendPrompt('How is the Kubernetes API integrated?')
sendPrompt('How does Prometheus metrics ingestion work?')
sendPrompt('How does ArgoCD GitOps integration work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Node.js aggregation layer normalize data?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used for caching in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does Socket.IO enable real-time streaming in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What does the CI/CD panel show in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What Kubernetes data is shown in the infra panel?')
sendPrompt('What metrics are shown in the observability panel?')
sendPrompt('What DORA metrics does the dashboard calculate?')
